purpose: Employment with minimum service, training-cost recovery, or early-exit bond obligations.

expected_clauses.why_expected: The bond obligation is the core risk object.
Early exit cost must be clear, proportionate, and evidence-based.
Bond consequences on termination should be clear.
Notice affects whether exit triggers penalties.
Forum clarity helps disputes but is not the core risk.

false_positive_guardrails: Do not treat every use of word bond as employment bond unless service period, training cost, or early exit is present.
Do not mark penalty missing if liquidated damages or repayment obligation appears.
Training repayment is higher risk when no itemized cost proof or pro-rata reduction exists.
